full_text:
Ren Lan 任覽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ren Lan (任覽)was born in Rongyang. Friend of Wei Feng, forewarned by Zheng Mao of Wei Feng’s ambitions. Ren Lan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
